MIT Collaboration — Simple Counts

One row per entity. Each cell shows two numbers: Works (bold, top) = distinct papers meeting the category; Collaborations (muted, below) = total co-authorship instances, counted with multiplicity (a pair sharing 270 papers together contributes 270, not 1). Within=has an internal co-author at this same entity · Across=has an MIT co-author elsewhere · Inter=has an external co-author · Intra=within∪across (Works) or within+across (Collaborations) · All=any qualifying collaboration. Works totals will not match the partner-summed anchored numbers on the Counts (Partners) page (a work spanning 2 partner depts counts once per partner there, once total here). MIT institution totals are unit-type independent.
Source: collab.py single-pass work totals + co-authorship instance counts · AAD2024-2904, MIT (institutionid 123) · counts are works; do not slice by year.
